packs.label: Init pack (.planning)
packs.description: Current monorepo .planning XML + planning-config (read-only snapshot for the cockpit).

files.content:
[planning]
sprintSize = 5
currentProfile = "human"
conventionsPaths = ["AGENTS.md", "REQUIREMENTS.md", ".planning/AGENTS.md"]

[profiles.human]
description = "Default human view."

[profiles.agent]
description = "Agent perspective; defaultJson = true."
defaultJson = true

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<state>
  <agent-registry />
  <current-phase>01</current-phase>
  <current-plan>bootstrap</current-plan>
  <status>active</status>
  <next-action>Task 01-07 is done. Resume the URL taxonomy and apps hub work, or pick the next documentation/planning task from TASK-REGISTRY.xml after build and lint stay green.</next-action>
  <references>
    <reference>AGENTS.md (repo root)</reference>
    <reference>apps/portfolio/content/docs/documentation/requirements.mdx</reference>
    <reference>apps/portfolio/content/docs/documentation/state.mdx</reference>
    <reference>.planning/AGENTS.md</reference>
    <reference>.planning/ROADMAP.xml</reference>
    <reference>.planning/TASK-REGISTRY.xml</reference>
    <reference>.planning/DECISIONS.xml</reference>
  </references>
  <agent-id-policy>
    <format>agent-YYYYMMDD-xxxx</format>
    <rule>Optional: register a unique id in STATE.xml before claiming tasks if you use CLI task-update.</rule>
    <generator>node vendor/repo-planner/scripts/loop-cli.mjs new-agent-id</generator>
  </agent-id-policy>
</state>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<task-registry>
  <phase id="01">
    <task id="01-01" agent-id="" status="done">
      <goal>Migrate narrative from removed .planning-archive/2026-03-29-pre-barebones/ into apps/portfolio/content/docs/documentation/requirements.mdx (Planning archive section) and registries; ROADMAP.xml + TASK-REGISTRY.xml updated; archive folder deleted.</goal>
      <keywords>bootstrap,migration,requirements,roadmap</keywords>
      <commands>
        <command>pnpm run lint</command>
      </commands>
      <depends></depends>
    </task>
    <task id="01-02" agent-id="" status="done">
      <goal>Add a shared logging layer for server and client flows, then instrument the assistant-ui chat path so request, retrieval, upstream, and error handling are easy to debug without permanent ad hoc console logs.</goal>
      <keywords>logging,chat,debugging,assistant-ui,rag</keywords>
      <commands>
        <command>pnpm --filter @portfolio/app test:unit</command>
        <command>pnpm run build</command>
        <command>pnpm run lint</command>
      </commands>
      <depends></depends>
    </task>
    <task id="01-03" agent-id="" status="done">
      <goal>Implement the blog and projects content-discovery pass after the planning loop: searchable/filterable index pages, command-palette hit flow, strict article/project structure, and matching docs-side records.</goal>
      <keywords>planning,blog,projects,search,filters,information-architecture</keywords>
      <commands>
        <command>pnpm --filter @portfolio/app test:unit</command>
        <command>if (Test-Path apps/portfolio/.next/lock) { Remove-Item -Force apps/portfolio/.next/lock }; pnpm --filter @portfolio/app test:e2e</command>
        <command>pnpm run build</command>
        <command>pnpm run lint</command>
      </commands>
      <depends></depends>
    </task>
    <task id="01-04" agent-id="" status="done">
      <goal>Books EPUB planning supplement: repeatable `repub epub --planning <dir>`, `runEpub` appendix for md/mdx/xml/toml/txt, `scripts/build-books.cjs` reads `book.json` epubPlanningDirs; Mordred's Tale bundles `apps/portfolio/content/docs/books/planning`. Section registry: `books-reader-02-02` done; docs in books planning-docs.mdx.</goal>
      <keywords>books,epub,repub-builder,planning,build-books</keywords>
      <commands>
        <command>pnpm --filter @portfolio/repub-builder run build</command>
        <command>pnpm run build:books</command>
      </commands>
      <depends></depends>
    </task>
    <task id="01-05" agent-id="" status="done">
      <goal>Phase 01 CLI baseline: planning --version (repo-planner package.json), repub --version, engines.node >= 22 on root + @portfolio/repub-builder + vendor/repo-planner; --help/subcommands already in loop-cli; Ink TTY + npm publish + pnpm dlx matrix remain documentation-site-07 / repo-planner-integration-01-13.</goal>
      <keywords>cli,repo-planner,repub,ink,dlx</keywords>
      <commands>
        <command>pnpm run planning -- --help</command>
        <command>pnpm run planning -- --version</command>
        <command>pnpm --filter @portfolio/repub-builder run repub -- --help</command>
        <command>pnpm --filter @portfolio/repub-builder run repub -- --version</command>
      </commands>
      <depends></depends>
    </task>
    <task id="01-06" agent-id="" status="done">
      <goal>Retrofit the existing blog posts and project writeups to the strict literal section contracts and richer metadata expected by the new discovery shell, then lock that contract with a regression test.</goal>
      <keywords>blog,projects,content,mdx,template-contract</keywords>
      <commands>
        <command>pnpm --filter @portfolio/app test:unit</command>
        <command>if (Test-Path apps/portfolio/.next/lock) { Remove-Item -Force apps/portfolio/.next/lock }; pnpm --filter @portfolio/app test:e2e</command>
        <command>pnpm run build</command>
        <command>pnpm run lint</command>
      </commands>
      <depends>01-03</depends>
    </task>
    <task id="01-08" agent-id="" status="done">
      <goal>Repo Planner phase 04: build-time `builtin-packs.json` from `.planning` + docs MDX; `repo-planner` exports `PlanningPackGallery` (data-in props); portfolio modal shell only; cockpit preloads init + docs packs; root `pnpm planning:embed-packs`; hook into app dev/build. Registry: repo-planner-integration-04 in apps/portfolio/content/docs/repo-planner/task-registry.mdx.</goal>
      <keywords>repo-planner,planning-pack,embed,builtin,cockpit</keywords>
      <commands>
        <command>pnpm planning pack embed-build --help</command>
        <command>pnpm planning:embed-packs</command>
        <command>pnpm run build</command>
      </commands>
      <depends></depends>
    </task>
    <task id="01-07" agent-id="" status="done">
      <goal>Normalize `.planning` and operator-facing planning docs to an ASCII-first punctuation policy so CLI, shell, and XML surfaces stay readable without changing public-facing prose typography.</goal>
      <keywords>planning,docs,encoding,ascii,operator-experience</keywords>
      <commands>
        <command>pnpm run build</command>
        <command>pnpm run lint</command>
      </commands>
      <depends></depends>
    </task>
  </phase>
</task-registry>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<roadmap>
  <phase id="01">
    <goal>Phase 01 (closed 2026-03-28): `.planning-archive` removed after migration into public docs; monorepo CLI baseline (`planning --version`, `engines.node >= 22`, documented `pnpm dlx` / workspace exec). Ongoing: keep `.planning/*.xml` aligned with section requirements/state/task-registry MDX; agents read root AGENTS.md first.</goal>
    <status>active</status>
    <depends></depends>
  </phase>
  <doc-flow>
    <doc name="documentation/requirements.mdx">Monorepo requirements narrative (public docs).</doc>
    <doc name="documentation/state.mdx">Cross-cutting queue + documentation section state.</doc>
    <doc name="documentation/roadmap.mdx">Human-readable section / root overview table.</doc>
    <doc name="REQUIREMENTS.md">Repo-root stub pointer only -- not canonical prose.</doc>
    <doc name=".planning/REQUIREMENTS.xml">Stub for XML-only tools; points at documentation paths.</doc>
    <doc name=".planning/ROADMAP.xml">Phase timeline for RepoPlanner.</doc>
    <doc name=".planning/TASK-REGISTRY.xml">Task graph and status.</doc>
    <doc name=".planning/AGENTS.md">Root planning section playbook (XML layer).</doc>
  </doc-flow>
</roadmap>

<*xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"*>
<planning-references>
  <doc>
    <path>apps/portfolio/content/docs/documentation/requirements.mdx</path>
    <content><![CDATA[
# Requirements (stub)

Canonical monorepo requirements: documentation section requirements.mdx.
Cross-cutting queue: documentation/state.mdx.
Overview: documentation/roadmap.mdx.

Repo root REQUIREMENTS.md is a stub pointer only.
]]></content>
  </doc>
</planning-references>

packs.label: Repo Planner docs
packs.description: Planning-section MDX from this site, exported as markdown bodies for in-browser preview.

files.content:
# Repo Planner — Decisions

## `REPOPLAN-SHELL-01` — Cockpit shell lives in the imported package

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| **Decision** | **Project / pack switcher**, **upload pack**, **export workspace**, **init-template downloads**, and the **dashboard chrome** around **`PlanningCockpit`** are **owned by the `repo-planner` package** (vendored submodule) and **imported** into the portfolio. The host app **does not** keep a long-term parallel shell such as **`PlanningCockpitDashboard`** once the package exports a single **host-mountable shell** (name TBD upstream: e.g. full layout wrapping `organisms/planning-cockpit`). |
| **Rationale** | One UX surface, one place to fix bugs; portfolio only supplies **routes**, **API handlers**, **env**, and **modal/book props**. |
| **Consequences** | **`repo-planner-integration-03`** includes **upstream (or transitional) extraction** of that shell; portfolio page becomes a thin **`import { … } from 'repo-planner'`** + layout wrapper. Interim: portfolio shell remains only until the package ships the export. |

## `REPOPLAN-EMBED-01` — Public embed is read-only on the server

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| **Decision** | **Embedded cockpit** ([`/apps/repo-planner`](/apps/repo-planner)): **GET** routes may read committed **`.planning/`** (today via CLI JSON; planned XML/read path). **`POST /api/planning-edits/apply`** and **`POST /api/planning-cli/run`** return **403** unless **`PLANNING_COCKPIT_ALLOW_SERVER_WRITES=1`**. No portfolio-hosted planning LLM; **Chat** tab stays inert unless the operator wires **`POST /api/ai/planning-chat`**. |
| **Rationale** | Same spirit as the EPUB reader: **browser-local / export → git**, not casual server mutation. |
| **Consequences** | Operators use **`pnpm planning`** / **standalone RepoPlanner** for write-capable workflows. |

| Mechanism | Portfolio default |
| --- | --- |
| **`POST /api/planning-edits/apply`** | **403** — enable only with **`PLANNING_COCKPIT_ALLOW_SERVER_WRITES=1`** |
| **`POST /api/planning-cli/run`** | **403** — same flag |
| **`GET /api/planning-state`** | **On** — reads bundle (CLI-backed today) |

## `REPOPLAN-REPORTS-01` — CLI telemetry outside `.planning/`

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| **Decision** | **`REPOPLANNER_REPORTS_DIR`** defaults to **`.planning-reports/`** at repo root (via **`scripts/run-planning-cli.mjs`** and **`next.config.ts`** / **`getRepoPlannerChildEnv()`**) so **`usage.jsonl`** and generated reports do not recreate **`.planning/reports/`** after minimal init. |
| **Rationale** | Bare **`.planning/`** stays XML + config only; reports are local operator artifacts. |

## `REPOPLAN-CLI-01` — Two CLIs, dlx-first publish story

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| **Decision** | **Today:** root **`pnpm planning …`** wraps **`vendor/repo-planner/scripts/loop-cli.mjs`**. **Target:** formal **RepoPlanner** + **`repub`** CLIs with **`pnpm dlx`** docs first; **`engines.node` ≥ 22** on publish; breaking argv allowed. Full table: **[documentation/requirements](/docs/documentation/requirements)** (CLI productization). |
| **Work ids** | **`documentation-site-07-01`**, **`repo-planner-integration-01-13`** — [documentation task registry](/docs/documentation/task-registry), [repo-planner task registry](/docs/repo-planner/task-registry). |

## `REPOPLAN-ROUTES-01` — Hand-maintained Next API routes

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| **Decision** | Upstream **`install-routes.mjs`** targets a different app layout than **`apps/portfolio`**; this repo keeps **explicit** `app/api/planning-*` routes and **`lib/repo-planner/`** helpers until **`install-routes.mjs`** gains a **`--app-dir=apps/portfolio`** mode or a catch-all delegate is justified. |

## `REPOPLAN-PACK-MODAL-01` — Planning pack copy

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| **Decision** | **Planning pack modal** should state that **packs align with [RepoPlanner](https://github.com/MagicbornStudios/RepoPlanner)** conventions (XML + loop-cli) and link upstream. Tracked as **`repo-planner-integration-03-06`**. |

## Open (resolve in task registry)

| Topic | Id |
| --- | --- |
| **Pack metrics** in embed: placeholder vs counts-from-XML only | **`repo-planner-integration-03-04`** |
| **XML-only GET** bundle without CLI spawn per poll | **`repo-planner-integration-03-03`** |

# Repo Planner -- Errors and Attempts

| When | Symptom | Cause | Mitigation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `2026-03-29` | **Client-side exception** on **`/apps/repo-planner`** (and modal) when a **pack workspace** was selected | **`localStorage`** workspace JSON could contain **`packs`** entries where **`files`** was not an array (hand edit, bad import, or future schema drift). Dashboard called **`activePack.files.map`** on bad data | **`parseWorkspaceState`** sanitizes packs, drops orphans, resets **`activeProjectId`**; **`Array.isArray`** before map -- **`lib/repo-planner-workspace-storage.ts`** |

## Embedded cockpit troubleshooting

| Symptom | What to do |
| --- | --- |
| Client error after **pack** experiments | Deploy **`2026-03-29`**+ includes parse hardening; if it persists, clear **`repo-planner-workspace-v1`** (DevTools → Application → Local Storage) |
| **POST** apply / CLI returns **403** | Expected on public embed -- set **`PLANNING_COCKPIT_ALLOW_SERVER_WRITES=1`** only in trusted operator sandboxes ([decisions](/docs/repo-planner/decisions) **`REPOPLAN-EMBED-01`**) |
| No live data in production | Confirm **`.planning/`** is in the deploy artifact and the host allows short-lived **`spawn`** for read APIs ([planning-docs](/docs/repo-planner/planning-docs) **Host embed**) |

## Minimal init -- what went wrong once

An early **`--minimal`** pass still wrote **`REQUIREMENTS.md`** / **`IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md`** *inside* **`.planning/`**, breaking the bare tree. **`usage.jsonl`** also recreated **`.planning/reports/`**. **Fixes:** **`runPlanningInitMinimal`**, **`REPOPLANNER_REPORTS_DIR`**, **`scripts/run-planning-cli.mjs`** defaulting reports to **`.planning-reports/`** -- full table in [getting started](/docs/repo-planner/getting-started) and [decisions](/docs/repo-planner/decisions) **`REPOPLAN-REPORTS-01`**.

## Operator recovery

| Action | When |
| --- | --- |
| Clear **`repo-planner-workspace-v1`** in devtools **Application → Local Storage** | Cockpit misbehaves after a deploy (rare); forces default **This repository** workspace |
| Use **Export workspace JSON** before experiments | Restorable backup if you hand-edit storage |

## Task link

| Id | Record |
| --- | --- |
| `repo-planner-integration-01-14` | [Task registry](/docs/repo-planner/task-registry) -- cockpit **localStorage** parse hardening |

# Repo Planner — Getting started

You do not have to use this monorepo's layout to benefit from a **planning loop**: keep a visible **state**, an ordered **task registry**, and a **roadmap** (or phase list). Agents and humans read the same files; ids stay stable in chat and commits.

## Reference implementation

[MagicbornStudios/RepoPlanner](https://github.com/MagicbornStudios/RepoPlanner) provides:

- **XML-shaped** templates under `.planning/templates/` (bundled inside the submodule when you run **full** init).
- **`loop-cli.mjs`** — snapshot, task updates, reports, `setup checklist`, `init` for greenfield bootstrap.
- **Cockpit UI** — embeddable in Next (see upstream **INSTALL.md**). **Policy** for this site: [decisions](/docs/repo-planner/decisions).

## Submodule

| Path | Upstream |
| --- | --- |
| `vendor/repo-planner` | [MagicbornStudios/RepoPlanner](https://github.com/MagicbornStudios/RepoPlanner) |

Update intentionally: `cd vendor/repo-planner && git fetch && git checkout <ref>` then commit the submodule pointer from the host repo.

```bash
git submodule update --init --recursive vendor/repo-planner
```

## Root scripts (repository root)

Defined in root **`package.json`**:

| Script | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `pnpm planning` | **`scripts/run-planning-cli.mjs`** → `loop-cli.mjs` (sets **`REPOPLANNER_REPORTS_DIR=.planning-reports`** unless overridden) |
| `pnpm planning:init` | `init --minimal --no-agents-md` — **`.planning/`** = XML + **`planning-config.toml`** + **`.planning/AGENTS.md`**; may create repo-root **`REQUIREMENTS.md`** stub if missing; **canonical** narrative = **[documentation/requirements](/docs/documentation/requirements)** + **[documentation/state](/docs/documentation/state)**; **no** `IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md`; **no** `.planning/templates`, `phases/`, `reports/`, narrative `.md` under `.planning/` |
| `pnpm planning:init:force` | Same with `--force` (overwrites bootstrap files in `.planning/`) |
| `pnpm planning:init:full` | Upstream-style init (`templates/`, `phases/01-greenfield/`, `reports/.gitkeep`, `.planning/README.md`) — use only when you need RepoPlanner templates locally |
| `pnpm planning:init:full:force` | Full init with `--force` |
| `pnpm planning:snapshot` | Snapshot / agent context |
| `pnpm planning:checklist` | `setup checklist` |
| `pnpm planning:ui` / `pnpm planning:report-view` | **Local** report viewer (default port from CLI) |
| `pnpm planning:embed-packs` | **`planning pack embed-build`** with this repo’s **`-o`** / **`--docs-dir`** → **`apps/portfolio/public/planning-embed/builtin-packs.json`** (cockpit built-in packs). App **dev** / **build** also run **`apps/portfolio/scripts/build-planning-embed-packs.cjs`**, which calls the same **`vendor/repo-planner/scripts/lib/embed-builtin-packs-build.mjs`** implementation. |
| `pnpm planning pack embed-build` | **`--help`** for flags. Requires **`-o, --out <file>`**; optional **`--docs-dir`**, **`--planning-dir`**, **`--docs-path-prefix`**. Node API: **`repo-planner/embed-builtin-packs-build`** (`runPlanningEmbedBuildSync`, `buildEmbedBuiltinPacksPayload`). |
| `pnpm run planning -- --version` | Prints **`vendor/repo-planner/package.json`** `version` (wrapper strips a lone **`--`** so **`pnpm`** passes args through reliably). |

**CLI dependencies** (`commander`, `fast-xml-parser`, `@iarna/toml`, `ejs`, `gray-matter`) are installed at the **workspace root** (and **`gray-matter`** is listed under **`vendor/repo-planner`** for clarity) so `node` can resolve them when executing the submodule script.

### Quick commands

```bash
pnpm planning setup checklist
pnpm planning snapshot
pnpm planning:ui
```

Pass **`--root <path>`** or set **`REPOPLANNER_PROJECT_ROOT`** if the CLI must resolve a different project root than **`process.cwd()`**. Set **`REPOPLANNER_REPORTS_DIR`** (relative to project root or absolute) for **`usage.jsonl`** / report **`latest.md`** — this monorepo defaults to **`.planning-reports/`** via **`scripts/run-planning-cli.mjs`** and **`next.config.ts`**. See [decisions](/docs/repo-planner/decisions) **`REPOPLAN-REPORTS-01`**.

**Brownfield / minimal bootstrap:**

```bash
pnpm planning:init
```

Creates **`.planning/`** for **XML** + **`planning-config.toml`** + **`.planning/AGENTS.md`**. Execution lives in **`ROADMAP.xml`** / **`TASK-REGISTRY.xml`** / **`STATE.xml`** — not `IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md`. Stub **`REQUIREMENTS.xml`** points at documentation paths.

## MDX section docs vs XML

- **Public narrative + section registries:** `apps/portfolio/content/docs/<section>/planning/*.mdx` for planning records, with non-planning reference docs beside that folder.
- **Structured agent loop (RepoPlanner):** `.planning/*.xml` + `planning-config.toml` after **`pnpm planning:init`**. **Monorepo narrative + cross-cutting queue:** **[documentation/requirements](/docs/documentation/requirements)** and **[documentation/state](/docs/documentation/state)**.

## Planning files: what to use when

| File | Role |
| --- | --- |
| **`ROADMAP.xml`** | Product / theme timeline — milestones and phases as the cockpit expects. |
| **`TASK-REGISTRY.xml`** | Tasks — goals, keywords, verification commands, status. |
| **`STATE.xml`** | Pointer — `current-phase`, `next-action`, optional agent registry. |
| **[documentation/requirements](/docs/documentation/requirements)** + **[documentation/state](/docs/documentation/state)** | **Monorepo narrative + cross-cutting queue** (canonical). Repo-root **`REQUIREMENTS.md`** is a short pointer only. |
| **`.planning-reports/`** | **Local only** — CLI usage + generated reports when **`REPOPLANNER_REPORTS_DIR`** / root **`pnpm`** scripts are used. |

**Phases folder** exists only after **`pnpm planning:init:full`**. Default **minimal** layout has **no** `.planning/phases/`.

## Bare `.planning` (default) vs full upstream init

**Contract:** **`.planning/`** is the **root planning section** (XML + **`planning-config.toml`** + **`.planning/AGENTS.md`**). **Human** monorepo narrative lives in **documentation** MDX + **`.planning/*.xml`** for machine loop.

**Default `pnpm planning:init`** creates:

| Under **`.planning/`** | At **repo root** | Omitted (use **`pnpm planning:init:full`**) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `planning-config.toml`, `STATE.xml`, `TASK-REGISTRY.xml`, `ROADMAP.xml`, `DECISIONS.xml`, `ERRORS-AND-ATTEMPTS.xml`, `REQUIREMENTS.xml` (stub → documentation paths), **`AGENTS.md`** | **`REQUIREMENTS.md`** stub only if bootstrap creates it | `.planning/templates/`, `.planning/phases/`, `.planning/README.md` |

**Local-only:** **`.planning-reports/`** (gitignored). **Former archive:** **`.planning-archive/`** was removed after migration; see **[documentation requirements](/docs/documentation/requirements)** (**Planning archive** section).

**What went wrong in an early `--minimal` pass** (fixed in this repo): narrative **`REQUIREMENTS.md` / `IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md`** inside **`.planning/`** broke the bare tree; **`usage.jsonl`** recreated **`reports/`**. Mitigations: **`runPlanningInitMinimal`**, **`REPOPLANNER_REPORTS_DIR`**, **`run-planning-cli.mjs`** defaults — detail in [errors and attempts](/docs/repo-planner/errors-and-attempts).

## Standalone cockpit (operators)

1. Clone [MagicbornStudios/RepoPlanner](https://github.com/MagicbornStudios/RepoPlanner) (or use upstream release / desktop binary).
2. Install dependencies for the **web** app when present (path per upstream README).
3. Point at **this** repository: `REPOPLANNER_PROJECT_ROOT=/absolute/path/to/custom_portfolio` then start the dev server from the RepoPlanner repo.
4. Edit in the cockpit, **export**, and commit from git.

## Embedded cockpit on this site

[`/apps/repo-planner`](/apps/repo-planner) mounts the vendored UI with **read-only server** defaults: **GET** routes may read committed **`.planning/`**; **`POST /api/planning-edits/apply`** and **`POST /api/planning-cli/run`** return **403** unless **`PLANNING_COCKPIT_ALLOW_SERVER_WRITES=1`**. No portfolio-hosted planning LLM. **Workspace chrome** (pack upload, project switcher, export) is **interim host code** today; target is an export from **`repo-planner`** — [Decisions](/docs/repo-planner/decisions) **`REPOPLAN-SHELL-01`**, **`REPOPLAN-EMBED-01`**.

| Piece | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Route | `apps/portfolio/app/apps/repo-planner/page.tsx` |
| Client | `apps/portfolio/components/repo-planner/RepoPlannerCockpitClient.tsx` |
| Package | `package.json` → `"repo-planner": "file:../../vendor/repo-planner"` |
| Transpile + env | `next.config.ts` — `transpilePackages`, **`REPOPLANNER_PROJECT_ROOT`**, **`REPOPLANNER_REPORTS_DIR`** |
| APIs | `app/api/planning-*` + `lib/repo-planner/` |

Full **code map** and production notes: [Planning docs — Host embed](/docs/repo-planner/planning-docs#host-embed-on-this-site).

### Gaps snapshot

| Topic | Status |
| --- | --- |
| **CLI in this repo** | **Done** — root `pnpm planning*`; **planned** Ink + **`pnpm dlx`** + publish: **`documentation-site-07-01`**, **`repo-planner-integration-01-13`**. |
| **XML bootstrap** | **Done** — **`pnpm planning:init`** minimal; **`planning:init:full`** for upstream templates. |
| **Upstream `web/` in submodule** | **Optional** — use embedded page or standalone clone with **`REPOPLANNER_PROJECT_ROOT`**. |
| **Pack parity (site vs RepoPlanner)** | Related but not identical until aligned — see [task registry](/docs/repo-planner/task-registry). |

## Planned: formal CLI (`pnpm dlx` first, publish later)

**Target:** two CLIs — **RepoPlanner** (submodule) and **`repub`** — with **`pnpm dlx`** docs first. # Repo Planner -- Planning Docs

[RepoPlanner](https://github.com/MagicbornStudios/RepoPlanner) is vendored at **`vendor/repo-planner`**. This section documents how **this portfolio** wires it: root **`pnpm`** scripts, `.planning/` at the monorepo root, and **what never ships** on the public site.

| Page | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| [Apps hub](/apps) | Operator gallery |
| [Repo Planner tool](/apps/repo-planner) | Embedded cockpit + live read APIs |
| [Getting started](/docs/repo-planner/getting-started) | Submodule, root scripts, planning file roles, standalone operators |
| [Decisions](/docs/repo-planner/decisions) | ADRs: shell ownership, read-only embed, reports dir, routes, CLI story |
| [Reader shell + Repo Planner embed](/docs/documentation/reader-repo-planner-embed-architecture) | **repub-builder** reader shell, shared cockpit modal, docs context menu |
| [State](/docs/repo-planner/state) | Current focus / queue for this section |
| [Task registry](/docs/repo-planner/task-registry) | Executable tasks (`repo-planner-integration-*`) |
| [Errors and attempts](/docs/repo-planner/errors-and-attempts) | Cockpit / CLI failures and mitigations |

Repo-wide loop: **[Global -- Planning docs](/docs/global/planning-docs)**; diagrams and id grammar: **[Global planning guide](/docs/global/global-planning)**. **Monorepo requirements** (including CLI decisions): **[Documentation -- Requirements](/docs/documentation/requirements)**. **Roadmap-style overview:** **[Documentation -- Roadmap](/docs/documentation/roadmap)**.

## Workflow stance

- **Roadmap, state, task registry, and decisions** are the living records.
- Any one-off phase plan should live under a section planning folder such as `planning/plans/<phase-id>/`.
- `IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md` should be treated as a legacy compatibility pointer only, not the default planning artifact for new work.
- RepoPlanner should align with the same structure instead of encouraging parallel "plan vs task registry" workflows.

## Host embed on this site

**Intent:** Browser edits stay **local / export → git**; the server does not persist casual cockpit mutations. Full detail: [Decisions](/docs/repo-planner/decisions) **`REPOPLAN-EMBED-01`**, **`REPOPLAN-SHELL-01`**.

| Surface | Default behavior |
| --- | --- |
| **GET** planning APIs | Read committed **`.planning/`** (today often CLI-backed JSON; XML read path planned -- [task registry](/docs/repo-planner/task-registry) **`03-03`**) |
| **`POST /api/planning-edits/apply`**, **`POST /api/planning-cli/run`** | **403** unless **`PLANNING_COCKPIT_ALLOW_SERVER_WRITES=1`** |
| **Planning chat / in-site LLM** | **Out of scope** -- **`POST /api/ai/planning-chat`** returns **501** unless you wire a backend |
| **Workspace chrome** (project switcher, pack upload, export, init downloads) | **Target:** owned by the **`repo-planner`** package and imported; portfolio only mounts and supplies routes/env (**`REPOPLAN-SHELL-01`**). **Today:** interim implementation still lives under **`apps/portfolio`** until upstream exports a host shell. |

### Code map (Next.js app)

| Piece | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Route | `apps/portfolio/app/apps/repo-planner/page.tsx` |
| Client | `apps/portfolio/components/repo-planner/RepoPlannerCockpitClient.tsx` — workspace UI from **`repo-planner/host`** (`PlanningCockpitDashboard`, `RepoPlannerWorkspaceShell` in `vendor/repo-planner/`) |
| Package | `apps/portfolio/package.json` → `"repo-planner": "file:../../vendor/repo-planner"` |
| Transpile | `next.config.ts` → `transpilePackages: ['repo-planner']` |
| Env for child CLI | `REPOPLANNER_PROJECT_ROOT`, **`REPOPLANNER_REPORTS_DIR`** (see [Decisions](/docs/repo-planner/decisions) **`REPOPLAN-REPORTS-01`**) via `next.config.ts` / **`getRepoPlannerChildEnv()`** |
| API routes | `apps/portfolio/app/api/planning-*` + **`lib/repo-planner/`** (hand-maintained; **`REPOPLAN-ROUTES-01`**) |

### Operator alternatives

| Path | Notes |
| --- | --- |
| **`pnpm planning`** / **`pnpm planning:ui`** | Real CLI on your machine; reports under **`.planning-reports/`** when using root scripts |
| **Standalone RepoPlanner** | Clone upstream, set **`REPOPLANNER_PROJECT_ROOT`** to this repo -- [Getting started](/docs/repo-planner/getting-started) |

### Production notes

**GET** handlers may **`spawn`** the CLI for **`simulate loop --json`** -- confirm the host allows short-lived processes and that **`.planning/`** is present in the deploy artifact if you want live data. With default **read-only** POST policy, HTTP does not write **`.planning/`**.

## Phase `repo-planner-integration-03` (vendor cockpit body + data plane + shell upstream)

**Problem today:** [`/apps/repo-planner`](/apps/repo-planner) uses a **placeholder** live pane; workspace chrome is still **host-owned** (`PlanningCockpitDashboard` / `RepoPlannerWorkspaceShell`) while **`REPOPLAN-SHELL-01`** says **upload / pack switcher / export / init downloads** belong in the **`repo-planner`** package long term.

**Desired:**

- **Vendor `PlanningCockpit`** depth (metrics, %, charts, tasks, phases, state) composed in the live pane -- source: [`planning-cockpit.tsx`](https://github.com/MagicbornStudios/RepoPlanner/blob/main/components/organisms/planning-cockpit.tsx).
- **Host-mountable workspace shell** exported from **`repo-planner`** so the portfolio page is a thin **import + layout** (interim host shell until then).
- **Display** can use **parsed XML / on-disk reports** where possible so the UI is not defined by CLI spawn per poll for **read**; **writes** stay gated ([decisions](/docs/repo-planner/decisions) **`REPOPLAN-EMBED-01`**).
- **Pack mode** feeds the **same bundle shape** as live repo (parse `TASK-REGISTRY.xml`, `STATE.xml`, `ROADMAP.xml`, report `.md` in pack).
- **Init template downloads** + **planning pack modal** copy per **`REPOPLAN-PACK-MODAL-01`**.

### Data contract (conceptual)

Vendor UI expects a **bundle** (see `Bundle` in `planning-cockpit.tsx`): `snapshot`, `openTasks`, `openQuestions`, `context.summary.phases`, `agentsWithTasks`, etc. Host implements something like **`CockpitDataSource`**: `getBundle()`, `getMetrics()`, `getLatestReport()`, polling policy.

| Source | `getBundle()` | `getMetrics()` | Report markdown |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Live monorepo** | `/api/planning-state` (today: CLI JSON) → later XML reader route | `/api/planning-metrics` | `/api/planning-reports/latest` |
| **Uploaded pack** | Client or **`POST /api/planning-pack/parse`** → same JSON shape | Synthetic series or honest empty | First `*.md` in pack or summary from XML |

**Open:** pack metrics placeholder vs counts-from-XML only → task **`03-04`**.

### Feature parity (track against vendor `planning-cockpit.tsx`)

| Area | Feature | Live repo | Pack |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Overview | Completion %, counts, open questions, agents | target | target (XML counts) |
| Overview | Metrics line chart | target | partial / empty |
| Work | Tasks, phases, open questions | target | target |
| State | Snapshot, agents with tasks | target | target |
| Tools | Terminal (CLI POST) | only when server writes allowed | hide or N/A |
| Chat | Planning chat | stub / hidden | same |

### Phase exit gates

| Gate | Check |
| --- | --- |
| **UX** | **This repository** shows **tabs + metrics + tasks** (not placeholder) |
| **Pack** | Uploaded pack shows **consistent cockpit** or documented degraded mode |
| **Shell** | Workspace chrome **imported from `repo-planner`** OR documented interim with issue link |
| **Build** | `pnpm run build` + `pnpm run lint` |
| **Docs** | Rows below marked **`done`** where applicable |

| `repo-planner-integration-03-02` | `planned` | **Compose** vendor **`PlanningCockpit`** in live pane for **This repository**: upstream **`fetch` injection** or host wrapper; preserve layout padding | `03-01`, `01-09` | manual `/apps/repo-planner` shows tabs + charts |
| `repo-planner-integration-03-03` | `planned` | **Read path:** **`GET`** builds **same bundle JSON** from **`.planning/*.xml`** (+ optional `.planning-reports`) **without** CLI spawn every poll | `03-01` | parity smoke vs `/api/planning-state` |

### Modularity sequence (optional upstream PR first)

| Step | Outcome |
| --- | --- |
| Vendor: **`usePlanningCockpitData({ fetchState, … })`** or **`dataSource` props | URLs not hard-coded to `/api/planning-state` only |
| Host: wrapper passes existing routes | live row works |
| Host: pack adapter over **`WorkspaceStateV1`** | pack tab works |
| Replace placeholder | **`active.kind === 'live'`** uses composed cockpit |

Until upstream accepts injection, a **thin fork** of data-fetch lines only is acceptable if **`file:`** dep makes merges easy.

| `repo-planner-integration-04-02` | `done` | **`repo-planner`** exports **`PlanningPackGallery`** via **`repo-planner/planning-pack`**; **`builtinEmbedPackToPlanningPack`**; workspace **`surfaceBuiltinPackId`** + cockpit **`builtinPacks`** sidebar; client modules that re-export through barrels carry **`"use client"`** where needed for Next Flight | `04-01`, `02-01` (partial) | `pnpm run build`; modal + cockpit show built-ins |
| `repo-planner-integration-04-03` | `done` | **`loop-cli`** **`pack embed-build`** + shared **`scripts/lib/embed-builtin-packs-build.mjs`** (package export **`repo-planner/embed-builtin-packs-build`**); portfolio script imports the module | `01-13`, `04-01` | `pnpm planning pack embed-build --help`; `pnpm planning:embed-packs` |
